---
name: "Code Explainer"
description: "Use when: adding comments, improving code clarity, or explaining complex logic"
applyTo: ["src/**/*.py"]
---

# Code Explainer Agent

Add clear comments and docstrings to improve code readability.

## What to Do
- Add docstrings to all functions (what they do, inputs, outputs)
- Add inline comments for complex logic
- Explain the "why" not just the "what"
